title: Wire's Crafting Table
description: The small tweak that the crafting table has always needed.
body:
# WIRE'S CRAFTING TABLE

A small tweak for a big difference.

## LORE

For as long as I can remember, I have absolutely despised that one texture on the crafting table. You know the one... 

This texture takes up 2 of the 4 available textures that make up the sides of the Crafting Table. This texture has acted as a plague on my brain for nearly countless years. Even with the updates of the Crafting Table's texture in previous versions of the game that made it match more closely to the look of planks, the haunting texture on those 2 sides have remained the same.

Something had to be done. 

Too many of the world's most creative builders, designers, crafters, imagine..ers, have had to live with this texture and be restricted by the placement of the Crafting Table, the most useful block in the most popular game. Limited by the choice of the Crafting Table's placement, left to play their cards against fate to see if their creations would be utterly ruined depending on if this simple texture was visible. In some cases, the worst possible outcome, having BOTH sides of the crafting table showing this texture, could cause these creators to reside to the shameful and punishing act of hiding their Crafting Tableṡ in elaborate redstone contraptions.

It had to be stopped.

### AND SO WIRE'S CRAFTING TABLE WAS BORN

-  A wonderful alteration of a massively-beloved block.

-  A tweak of true witt.

- A new texture to end the world's suffering of the plaguing texture.


##### This is obviously a joke but I do really think that the Crafting Table sides that have that one small shear on them really needed to be tweaked and it has kinda bugged me for years. So here ya go.
